title: Fix AntiGhost FORK Crash
description: Fixes a crash on startup caused by AntiGhost FORK in 1.21+
body:
Changes in 1.21 break an [internal library](https://github.com/gbl/CrowdinTranslate) in [AntiGhost FORK](https://modrinth.com/mod/antighost-fork), causing a crash on startup. Since the fork developer hasn't said anything yet, I made this mod which fixes the crash.

AntiGhost FORK issue: [https://github.com/IkyMax/AntiGhost/issues/2](https://github.com/IkyMax/AntiGhost/issues/2)

Once the fork developer hopefully fixes the crash, I will mark this mod as deprecated.
